_comment: Luban overlay: Emscripten C++→WASM toolchain. Pinned by chromium-rev (the way emsdk indexes builds). Archive lives at storage.googleapis.com/webassembly/emscripten-releases-builds/<platform>/<rev>/wasm-binaries.<ext>. Top-level wrapper inside the zip is 'install/'. Bundles clang/lld/llvm-* + the emscripten Python+JS toolchain, but does NOT bundle node.exe or python.exe — those are required from PATH (depends on 'node'; users must install Python 3.x themselves).
